metadata.title: QuoteGen Engine
metadata.description: Modern platform for elegant, interactive web proposals

landing.badge: New enterprise release with Generative AI
landing.heroSubtitle: Paste messy notes. QuoteGen analyzes your client's website, estimates budget, extracts the palette and generates a signable digital proposal.
landing.mockBudgetRationale: Rationale: portal development, mobile ordering app, Stripe integration.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to close deals with a single link.
landing.featureBrandDesc: Automatic analysis of the client's website to extract logo, brand colors and main palette for the proposal.
landing.featureBudgetDesc: Analysis engine that estimates scope complexity from notes, providing smart budget guidance based on the market.
landing.featureSignDesc: Clients view the proposal online and can sign it instantly, updating your workspace in real time.
landing.pricingTitle: Choose the plan for your team
landing.pricingSubtitle: No hidden fees. Flexible plans for every company size.
landing.planStarterFeatures: 40 proposals/month|3 workspace members|Secure expiring links|Native PDF export
landing.planGrowthFeatures: 300 proposals/month|20 workspace members|Brand AI with vision|Real-time Stripe checkout
landing.planEnterpriseFeatures: 5000 proposals/month|200 workspace members|Advanced workflow management|Priority chat/video support

login.title: Sign in to your Workspace
login.subtitle: Manage proposals, brand assets and digital signatures in one platform.
login.errorSession: Unable to register session on the server.
login.errorFirebase: Email/password login requires Firebase Auth. Use Google or GitHub login.
login.errorInvalidCredential: Invalid credentials or user not found.
login.errorEmailInUse: This email is already registered. Sign in with this email.
login.errorWeakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters.

dashboard.createSubtitle: Fill in the fields and generate a branded AI proposal.

proposal.invalid: This proposal or link is invalid or has expired. Contact the sender for a new link.
proposal.signSubtitle: Legal validation via cryptographic electronic signature.
proposal.signHint: Enter your full name to confirm approval of the proposal, budget and specifications described above.
proposal.signNameRequired: Enter your full name to validate the signature.
proposal.signFailed: Signature failed. Try again or contact the administrator.
proposal.signSuccess: Proposal accepted and electronically signed successfully.
